articles.title: Scientists discover a protein that protects the brain from Alzheimer’s damage

articles.title: 'The dawn of a new space era': Vikram-1, India's 1st private orbital rocket, aces debut launch
articles.summary: Skyroot Aerospace's Vikram-1 rocket aced its debut mission on Saturday morning (July 18), making India the third nation with a private orbital launch capability.

articles.title: Why AI's environmental footprint won't disappear into orbit
articles.summary: AI companies increasingly want to move their operations into space. Elon Musk's SpaceX has applied to launch over a million AI data center satellites and ultimately build them on the moon.

articles.title: Prescribed burns may be lethal for lizards

articles.title: Giving bees a probiotic diet could help protect them from extreme temperatures

articles.title: 5.5 magnitude earthquake hits Peru's Andes region and kills at least 6 people
articles.summary: A 5.5 magnitude earthquake shook the Andes region of Peru, killing at least six people, injuring more than 30 and displacing 300, authorities said Sunday.

articles.title: Why a Ukrainian cruise missile is flying with hobby drone hardware

articles.title: AI may not make us stupid, but relying on it could weaken the skills built through practice

articles.title: Should we trust AI in the search for alien life? Scientists aren't so sure
articles.summary: New research suggests AI can be repeatedly fooled into mistaking non-life for life.

articles.title: Greece braces for year's first heat wave
articles.summary: Greece, which was spared the record heat that ravaged most of Europe in June, is finally bracing for its first heat wave of the year.

articles.title: Strange paraparticles could be reality’s missing ingredient
